scripts.tauri:build:intel: cd src-tauri && CI=false node ../node_modules/@tauri-apps/cli/tauri.js build --target x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.tauri:build:arm64: cd src-tauri && CI=false node ../node_modules/@tauri-apps/cli/tauri.js build --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.tauri:build:arm64:app: cd src-tauri && CI=false node ../node_modules/@tauri-apps/cli/tauri.js build --target aarch64-apple-darwin --bundles app
scripts.tauri:build:intel:app: cd src-tauri && CI=false node ../node_modules/@tauri-apps/cli/tauri.js build --target x86_64-apple-darwin --bundles app
scripts.build:dmg: npm run build && npm run tauri:build && node scripts/copy-dmg-to-dist.js
scripts.build:dmg:intel: npm run build && npm run tauri:build:intel && node scripts/copy-dmg-to-dist.js
